string.name: healthy_life_introduce
string.value: There's always a new way to play health.

string.name: dialog_text_privacy_content
string.value: Please read and fully understand the Service Agreement and Privacy Policy before continuing.

string.name: dialog_text_declaration_prompt
string.value: If you agree, tap Agree to continue.

string.name: privacy_text_content
string.value: This privacy notice describes the important parts of this statement, how the service processes your personal information, how you exercise your data subject rights, related data controllers, and how to contact the data controllers. If there is any inconsistency between the privacy notice and this statement, the privacy notice shall prevail. If not specified in the privacy notice, this statement shall prevail.

string.name: server_sync_reason
string.value: Save accounting records to the bitstripe server after Huawei account login and support multi-device restore.
